title: dirtie-srv
description: Go backend for IoT sensor provisioning and data processing. MQTT ingestion, InfluxDB + PostgreSQL storage.

title: dirtie-node
description: Firmware for Pi Pico W that handles provisioning over WiFi, I2C sensor data, publishes to MQTT broker.

title: dirtie-client
description: Android application used for provisioning and management of dirtie-node devices.

title: rpic
description: Provisioning system for raspberry pi cluster that runs dirtie-srv and other projects

title: go-agent
description: A barebones AI Agent harness written in Go.

title: sqncr
description: A task management MCP Server + TUI application.

title: wlblocks
description: A basic wayland client with some fundamental rendering functionality.

title: spartan-mittns
description: A handwired, 3d printed keyboard programmed with QMK.
